priorities.text: Finalize the autonomous agent org chart and operating cadence
Systemize content production into reusable distribution loops
Track positive revenue weekly with direct attribution visibility

tasks.title: Define agent roles and handoff rules
tasks.description: Clarify who scouts demand, creates assets, publishes, analyzes results, and escalates bottlenecks.

tasks.title: Build content distribution scorecard
tasks.description: Measure output, reach, CTR, lead capture, and downstream revenue by content loop.

tasks.title: Draft owned audience capture flow
tasks.description: Map calls-to-action, lead magnet logic, landing page hooks, and email follow-up entry points.

agents.name: Scout-01
agents.description: Maps market shifts, emerging content angles, and revenue opportunities worth testing.
agents.performanceNotes: Strong at surfacing asymmetrical bets. Best when given clear ICP constraints.

activity.message: Flagged two high-intent AI education niches worth packaging.
Ranked top three short-form hooks based on recent platform velocity.

agents.name: Forge-02
agents.description: Turns strategy into scripts, content briefs, publishing assets, and repurposing plans.
agents.performanceNotes: High throughput. Needs tighter approval criteria for brand voice edge cases.

activity.message: Drafted three repurposing ladders for the YouTube-to-email funnel.

agents.name: Closer-03
agents.description: Optimizes attention capture, lead magnet routing, and offer conversion across owned channels.

activity.message: Recommended tightening CTA density on the current lead capture flow.

agents.name: Pulse-04
agents.description: Summarizes loop performance, diagnoses bottlenecks, and suggests reinvestment priorities.
agents.performanceNotes: Reliable with clean datasets. Needs guardrails on sparse-sample conclusions.

activity.message: Compiled a weekly attribution summary for content-to-lead conversion.

decisions.question: Which growth loop should receive the next execution sprint?
decisions.summary: Prioritized YouTube-to-email acquisition over low-intent short-form reach because the owned audience multiplier is stronger.

decisions.question: How should content production be systemized for agent handoffs?
decisions.summary: Split ideation, scripting, editing QA, and distribution into four distinct responsibilities with KPI handoff points.

ideas.title: How I Would Build an AI Revenue Machine From Zero
The 5-Agent Content Stack Behind Compounding Reach
My Lead Capture System for Attention-to-Asset Conversion
Why Most AI Automation Content Fails to Monetize

items.title: Weekly Revenue Ops Sync
items.prepNotes: Review current MRR, blocked offers, and top content loop performance.

items.title: Creator Partnership Call
items.prepNotes: Clarify audience overlap and joint distribution upside.

items.title: Offer Debrief
items.prepNotes: Assess last week's lead quality and offer friction.
items.notes: Need stronger proof blocks above the fold.
items.actionItems: Rewrite landing page opener by Tuesday.

items.title: AI search workflows are shifting buyer discovery earlier
items.summary: Organic discovery is fragmenting across chat interfaces, making owned-asset capture even more valuable.

items.title: Competitor channel doubled output with faceless repurposing
items.summary: Volume increased without a clear conversion upgrade, which suggests room to outperform with better CTA systems.

items.title: B2B creator collaborations are converting better than solo launches
items.summary: Partnership-led distribution is showing stronger trust transfer and faster audience lift.

items.title: Opportunity: productize internal dashboards as premium operator assets
items.summary: The dashboard itself could become a lead magnet or premium template once the operating layer is mature.
